title: Static by Default
excerpt: For writing-heavy projects, static hosting is an advantage. Fast deploys and low ops are exactly the point.

title: Audience of One
excerpt: I write for one serious reader at a time. If that reader finds value, distribution can come later.

title: Make Constraints Visible
excerpt: Hidden constraints cause bad plans. Visible constraints create better tradeoffs.

title: Earned Confidence
excerpt: Confidence without reps is theater. Confidence with reps is calm.

title: Aim for Clarity
excerpt: Clarity is an engineering decision, not just a writing style. Clear code and clear text come from the same discipline.

title: The Durable Internet
excerpt: I admire sites that are mostly plain text and ideas. They feel lighter and age better.

title: Good Friction
excerpt: Not all friction is bad. A little friction can prevent expensive mistakes.

title: Defaults Matter
excerpt: Defaults decide outcomes at scale. Choose defaults that help even when nobody is paying attention.

title: Write for Future You
excerpt: Future me will forget assumptions. Good notes are a gift across time.

title: Small Batches
excerpt: Large releases hide risk. Small batches reveal risk early while it is cheap.
